title: Security: Downloaded HTML can make requests over SMB, revealing Windows credential hashes
bounty_rationale: report of lower impact user information disclosure
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
1) Visit site with malicious JavaScript.  
2) Menu - More Tools - Save As - Webpage, Complete.  
3) Open saved page (HTML) file in Google Chrome.  
4) In TCPView/Wireshark observe connection to port 445 (SMB2 protocol). The following information is leaked to the maliciou
